datapacks.name: Purple House
datapacks.notes: Project-owned rare overworld structure datapack. Adds a lady-focused purple L-shaped survival mansion with a spa-pool basement, large double bed, big kitchen, lovely living room, romantic lighting, courtyard pool, lush flower gardens, cat patio, bird pergola, duck pond, and chicken coop. Random-spread spacing is 108 chunks, about 2.986 square kilometers per placement cell.
datapacks.notes_1: Inspired by the referenced Ultimate Survival House tutorial frame: broad twin staircases, raised L-shaped decks, open side utility bays, central grid facade, intersecting gable roof, courtyard pool, side terrace farms, stone-and-wood support rhythm, and railings.
datapacks.notes_2: Uses mostly vanilla block IDs for worldgen stability, with pets for cats, parrots, chickens, and Untitled Duck Mod ducks because those are active in the Pummelchen pack.
